hero.subheading: For 46 years, Kolleris has been the supplier that shipping companies, factories and workshops call. Tools that <hl>work</hl> — no excuses.

items.title: You Need It Tuesday
items.body: They get it to you Thursday. Direct relationships with Milwaukee, Knipex, Wera — precise availability, no “we'll see”.

items.title: The Wrong Equipment
items.body: Nobody bothers to understand what you actually need. We know the difference between marine and industrial equipment.

items.title: Nobody Answers
items.body: Tickets, chatbots, phone queues. Us: one phone number, one person who has the answer.
